The '''Scroll of the Raich''' was a manuscript owned by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|Shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]]. The scroll told the tale of the terrible forest creature known as the [[Raich]] and was written in [[Ewokese/Legends|Ewokese]].

The tale written on the scroll recounted how the Ewoks of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] had decided to rid the forest of the Raich and of the brief conflict between the Raich and the village's best warriors. The scroll's tale ended by explaining how the Ewoks had placed a [[magic cap]] on the Raich, thereby transforming him into a harmless tree.

The scroll finished by warning the reader that the Raich would stay a tree only if the cap remained on the Raich's head. The Scroll of the Raich was kept within Logray's hut among his many writings and manuscripts. During the [[Raich crisis|temporary return]] of the Raich, Logray used [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] to summon the scroll from his hut and read the tale to the young Ewoks, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]].
